generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted post-gearbox of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position angle data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox position angle data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data derived from position sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration data derived from position sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for real-time visualization of robot data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardMonitoringService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance DashboardMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring of robot motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset metadata management using AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion control using SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAction
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System structural modeling using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification insights for updating control parameters"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of robot motion parameters via dashboard visualization"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of control parameters based on friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset metadata management via AAS"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Motion control adjustments via SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights from SysML diagrams"
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells metadata model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis environment"
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive one-way data flow with no data transmitted back to the physical system"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT; specific time interval or synchronization rate not documented in the source material"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural SysML models, Simulink simulation models, and live operational data via AAS, with traceable data processing components and unified dashboard visualization for friction analysis"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase; digital shadow continuously monitors and refines models during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations"
]

    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission between physical robot and digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per Industrie 4.0 standards and SysML modeling standards"
]
